name: Entertainer
description: Artists, performers, journalists and others who make their living in the public eye.

artist.name: Artist
artist.description: You are a painter, sculptor, composer or similar.

journalist.name: Journalist
journalist.description: You report the news across the stars.

performer.name: Performer
performer.description: You are a musician, actor, or other live performer.

mishaps.1: Severely injured (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: A scandal destroys your career. Lose 1 SOC and gain a Rival.
mishaps.3: You offend a powerful patron, critic, or corporate sponsor. Gain them as an Enemy and lose any Benefit rolls from this term.
mishaps.4: A story or piece of work gets you into legal or political trouble. You are blacklisted and must leave the business.
mishaps.5: An addiction or lifestyle excess catches up with you. Reduce one physical or mental characteristic by 1.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: You fall foul of a critic, rival or corporate backer. Gain a Rival.
events.4: You spend time honing your craft. Gain one of Art 1, Persuade 1, Deception 1 or Carouse 1.
events.5: You become the darling of a social circle for a time. Gain DM+2 to a Benefit roll this term.
events.6: You have a brush with a major celebrity, noble or criminal figure. Gain them as a Contact, Ally, Rival or Enemy (your choice).
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You are invited to perform or exhibit at a prestigious venue. Roll Art 8+ or Persuade 8+; on success, gain a level in Art and DM+2 to your next Advancement roll. On failure, lose 1 SOC.
events.9: You travel extensively, touring or covering stories across several worlds. Gain one of Streetwise 1, Language 1, Pilot (small craft) 1 or Steward 1.
events.10: One of your works becomes a hit, story, or sensation. Gain DM+2 to a Benefit roll this term and DM+1 to your next Advancement roll.
events.11: You receive major patronage or a breakthrough opportunity. Gain one level in any skill of your choice, or DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: You become a superstar in your field. You are automatically promoted and gain SOC +1.
